name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Product surface
Teach, Portfolio, Sources, Administration, and role-specific guidance now share one system story.

Direct proof
The browser shows zero console errors and no horizontal overflow on the validated landing and application paths.

Documentation
Five diagram packages and three role guides are delivered with editable sources and accessible exports.

name: Google Shape;534;p58
text:
Data boundary
Validation remains synthetic-data-only until the EFVP and legal review are closed.

Runtime boundary
Private engines stay behind Gate5 and outside the Cloudflare web bundle.

Readiness boundary
This review proves pre-alpha execution, not production, legal, clinical, disciplinary, or autonomous authority readiness.
